name: Hidro
description: Aplicación PWA para monitoreo en tiempo real de cultivos hidropónicos de tomate con análisis automático de nutrientes y pH

data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 1280 720'><defs><linearGradient id='grad1' x1='0%' y1='0%' x2='100%' y2='100%'><stop offset='0%' style='stop-color:%23ef4444;stop-opacity:1' /><stop offset='100%' style='stop-color:%23dc2626;stop-opacity:1' /></linearGradient></defs><rect fill='%23f0f9ff' width='1280' height='720'/><circle cx='200' cy='150' r='60' fill='url(%23grad1)' opacity='0.9'/><path d='M 200 70 Q 210 90 210 130' stroke='%2310b981' stroke-width='6' fill='none' stroke-linecap='round'/><text x='320' y='180' font-size='50' fill='%23dc2626' font-weight='bold'>Sistema de Monitoreo Hidropónico</text><text x='320' y='240' font-size='32' fill='%23666'>Tomate Hidropónico en Tiempo Real</text><path d='M 100 320 L 1100 320' stroke='%23dc2626' stroke-width='1' opacity='0.3'/><g><rect x='100' y='380' width='350' height='250' rx='10' fill='%23e0f2fe' opacity='0.3' stroke='%230891b2' stroke-width='2'/><text x='275' y='420' font-size='20' fill='%230891b2' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='bold'>🌡️ Temperatura</text><text x='275' y='550' font-size='16' fill='%23333' text-anchor='middle'>Agua: 22°C | Ambiente: 25°C</text></g><g><rect x='500' y='380' width='350' height='250' rx='10' fill='%23fef3c7' opacity='0.3' stroke='%23f59e0b' stroke-width='2'/><text x='675' y='420' font-size='20' fill='%23f59e0b' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='bold'>⚗️ pH y EC</text><text x='675' y='550' font-size='16' fill='%23333' text-anchor='middle'>pH: 6.2 | EC: 2.1 mS/cm</text></g><g><rect x='900' y='380' width='280' height='250' rx='10' fill='%23dcfce7' opacity='0.3' stroke='%2310b981' stroke-width='2'/><text x='1040' y='420' font-size='20' fill='%2310b981' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='bold'>🌱 Estado</text><text x='1040' y='550' font-size='16' fill='%23333' text-anchor='middle'>Óptimo ✓</text></g></svg>
